headline: Willis: Leaders must move from caution to control as AI reshapes risk and resilience
summary: LONDON, May 28, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- AI is rapidly reshaping how risk is understood, priced and managed, but the rate of adoption is outpacing existing AI governance frameworks. New research from the latest Risk and Resilience review by Willis, a WTW business (NASDAQ: WTW) highlights how AI is being embedded across underwriting, claims, cyber defence, and operational decision-making. This growing integration is introducing new challenges around accountability, liability and insurability. The
